# ============================================================================
# GENERATED BY PARA, PopcornSAR
# Copyright(c) 2024 by PopcornSAR Co.,Ltd. All rights reserved.
# ============================================================================
 
add_executable(${PARA_APP_NAME})
 
# ============================================================================
# This setting is required for binary targets.
# Please modify the section below to suit your configuration.
# ============================================================================
Para_Target(${PARA_APP_NAME}
            PARA_LIBS_PRIVATE core log exec com
            PARA_GEN_DIR ${PARA_APP_GEN_DIR}
            OUTPUT_NAME ${PARA_APP_NAME}
)
# ============================================================================
target_include_directories(${PARA_APP_NAME}
                           PRIVATE
                           ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
                           ${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS})
# ============================================================================
target_link_libraries(${PARA_APP_NAME}
                      PRIVATE
                      pthread
                      ${OpenCV_LIBS})
# ============================================================================
target_sources(${PARA_APP_NAME}
               PRIVATE
               providersensor/rootswcomponent/port/sensor.cpp
               providersensor/rootswcomponent/port/sensorv2.cpp
               providersensor/rootswcomponent/providersensor.cpp
               main.cpp
)

# 1. Define the path to the source image file
set(IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/providersensor/rootswcomponent/yellowLights.jpg")

# 2. Copy the image file to the binary output directory after building ProviderSensor
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
    "${IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE}"
    $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>
    COMMENT "Copying yellowLights.jpg to binary directory..."
)

# 3. Install the image file to the opt directory
install(FILES "${IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)
